description_long: This object consists of a wooden barrel and a wooden crate placed together. The barrel is constructed from light-colored wooden staves, bound by several metallic hoops that provide structural reinforcement. The ends of the barrel are flat and show the circular arrangement of the staves, while the metallic bands are evenly spaced along its length. The crate is made from dark, weathered wooden planks, assembled into a square box with a flat, solid lid on top. Both objects have a rustic, utilitarian appearance, suggesting they are used for storage or transport of goods. The surfaces of both the barrel and crate display visible wood grain and texture, with the metal bands on the barrel adding a contrasting sheen.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with metal hoops and a dark wooden crate, both showing visible wood grain and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: The barrel is lying on its side next to the crate, showing the circular end and the metallic hoops, with the crate's top and side panels visible.
description_view_1: The barrel is mostly seen from the side, highlighting the metal hoops and the length of the staves, while the crate's top and one side are visible.
description_view_2: The crate is in the foreground with its top and two sides visible, while the barrel is behind, showing its circular end and part of its side.
description_view_3: The barrel's side with metal hoops is prominent, and the crate is behind it, showing its top and one side.
